testcase.classname: Tasks API GET /tasks - should return all tasks

testcase.classname: Tasks API POST /tasks - should create a new task

testcase.classname: Tasks API POST /tasks - should reject empty title
testcase.name: Tasks API POST /tasks - should reject empty title

testcase.classname: Tasks API PUT /tasks/:id - should update a task

testcase.classname: Tasks API PUT /tasks/:id - should return 404 if task not found

testcase.classname: Tasks API DELETE /tasks/:id - should delete a task

testcase.classname: Tasks API DELETE /tasks/:id - should return 404 if not found
